episodes.title: HOW I ESCAPED A CULT
episodes.description:
In this powerful and emotional video, a guest shares her firsthand experience of growing up inside a strict religious cult. She talks about how the group controlled nearly every part of her life, from what she believed to how she behaved, and even how she viewed the outside world.

As her story unfolds, she opens up about the darker reality behind it all. She describes manipulation, fear-based control, and different forms of abuse that were treated as normal within the group. Questioning authority wasn’t allowed, and members were often cut off from friends, family, and anything outside the cult.

The most gripping part of her story is how she managed to leave. Escaping wasn’t simple. It meant risking everything she had ever known, including the people in her life and any sense of security. She explains what made her start questioning things and the difficult, sometimes dangerous journey of getting out.

Her story doesn’t end with escape. She also talks about what came after, learning how to think for herself, dealing with the trauma, and slowly rebuilding her identity and life on her own terms.

It’s an eye-opening and deeply human story about control, survival, and the strength it takes to break free.
